mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO workflow_step_link ( link_id, workflow_id, source_step_id, target_step_id, label, color, condition_expr, order_num, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.linkId}, #{item.workflowId}, #{item.sourceStepId}, #{item.targetStepId}, #{item.label}, #{item.color}, #{item.conditionExpr}, #{item.orderNum}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime} )
